title: Open doors of opportunity
subtitle: A visualisation for when profitable ideas feel scarce or consistently out of reach.
excerpt: A short visualisation drawn from the Week 7 MONEY Journal ritual. You walk a corridor of open doors, each one a different opportunity — the practice is in staying long enough to look.
sourceNotes: Drawn from the Week 7 Ritual in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom and Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The doors-of-light image is Rebecca's.

practice.whenToUse: Use at the start of a working week when ideas or opportunities feel absent.

content.text: A five-minute visualisation drawn from the Week 7 MONEY Journal ritual. The image: a corridor of open doors, each leading somewhere different. The practice is not analysis — it's staying in the image long enough for one door to feel right.
Sit quietly. Close your eyes. Take three slow breaths.

Picture yourself standing at the start of a wide corridor. The walls are plain. Along both sides, as far as you can see, are open doors — each one letting in a different quality of light. Some are bright. Some are warm. One or two are dim. All of them are open.

You don't have to enter any of them. Walk slowly. Notice which ones draw your eye. Notice which ones you pass quickly. There's no correct response here — you're gathering information, not making decisions.
When one door holds your attention, stop. Look through it. You don't need to see the full picture — just the quality of the space beyond. How does it feel to stand here? What pulls you?
Stay for a minute. Then take a breath, open your eyes, and write one sentence about which door held you and what you noticed.

Drawn from the Week 7 Ritual in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom and Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The corridor-of-open-doors image is Rebecca's from the Inspired Opportunity Activation.
